name: Catfish Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Combine the chopped catfish fillet and crushed stale bread in a bowl.
3. Add water, minced green onion, parsley, egg whites, lemon juice, powdered mustard, and black pepper to the bowl. Mix well.
4. Whisk together egg white, skim milk, and set aside.
5. Form the mixture into 4 patties using your hands.
6. Dip each patty in the whisked egg and milk mixture.
7. Coat each patty with bread crumbs.
8. Bake on a lightly greased or non-stick baking sheet for 12 minutes.
9. Serve 2 cakes garnished with lemon quarters per person.
10. Crabmeat can be used to make Crab Cakes, or any other fish can be substituted. The Mock Tartar Sauce recipe provided follows.
Mock Tartar Sauce
1/2 cup Nonfat yogurt
4 tbsp Minced sour pickle
4 tbsp Minced pitted green olive
4 tbsp Minced fresh parsley
1/2 tsp Powdered mustard
1 tsp Fresh lemon juice
1/8 tsp Freshly ground pepper
Combine all ingredients and refrigerate in a tightly covered container. This sauce will keep for up to a week if stored as suggested.
